review_title: Great Technology, especially for small businesses!
description: Overall, I had a great experience with Equally AI and I think it is an innovative product that delivers.
author: Jenni F.
pros: Equally AI is great because it allows small businesses to very easily add accessibility to a website, without the need for a massive tech team or expensive changes to the existing site. It is easy to set up and seems to be easy to use as well.
cons: I wish that the company offered at least an hour or so of initial training when the product is purchased, instead of having this be a separate cost addon.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: great tool for helping website accessibility
description: As a user and developer, the installation and running of the application seems to be perfect, I am looking forward to running better audits with their new tool
author: trevor G.
pros: It provides many options for users to customise and adjust their settings when visiting websites.
cons: I like that it has a built-in dyslexia font, you can add your customisations to your branding and colors of your website
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Saves us a lot of time
description: Flowy pinpointed ARIA issues we didn’t even know about, helping us fix them efficiently. Definitely recommend it for thorough and effective accessibility checks.
author: David J.
pros: Our team is pretty well-versed in accessibility, but we implemented Equally AI’s Flowy as an extra layer of security to ensure full compliance. Surprisingly, it flagged multiple ARIA (Accessible Rich Internet Applications) issues on our interactive dashboard that we had completely overlooked. For instance, some aria-labels on complex charts weren’t appropriately defined, which meant screen readers couldn’t interpret the data correctly. [sensitive content hidden] provided expert guidance on how to fix these ARIA roles and attributes without breaking our functionality. This saved us a lot of resources that would have been spent on extensive retrofits and potential user complaints.
cons: While the ARIA fixes were manageable, I’d appreciate even more detailed documentation within the solution itself to speed up the fix process. The support was excellent, but I prefer having all info on hand.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Equally AI is just amazing
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: All features are included in the basic pack
cons: All good, good value for money, nothing that I found
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A reliable Accessibility Solution for Financial Services
description: Equally AI has been a valuable addition to our practice. It not only helps us meet accessibility and compliance standards but also shows our clients that inclusivity is a priority for us. For financial advisors who want a dependable accessibility solution, I'd give this tool a full 5/5
author: Angela W.
pros: Equally AI has given us the confidence that our website is fully accessible for all of our clients. I really appreciate how simple the setup was and how the accessibility options work seamlessly without disrupting the professional look of our site. Clients have mentioned that navigation feels smoother, especially those who rely on screen readers, which tells us the tool is working exactly as intended.
cons: The only thing I would like to see improved is more customization for report, so we can tailor the data to compliance needs in the financial industry. It's a small limitation but not a deal breaker.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Making our Online Store Accessible to Everyone
description: Equally AI has been a huge step forward for us in making accessibility a standard part of our customer experience. Our shoppers have noticed the improvement, and our team feels confident that we're being proactive about inclusivity.
author: Lynn R.
pros: Equally AI has made it much easier for us to ensure that all of our customers can shop online without barriers. I really like how simple it is to install and how quickly the accessibility features adjust to customer needs, whether that's larger text, higher contrast, or screen reader compatibility. It gives us peace of mind knowing our retail site is inclusive for everyone.
cons: The only thing I'd like to see improved i a few more option is a few more options for customizing the widget design to better match our branding. Functionally, though, it works exactly as promised.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Smooth Accessibility Compliance for compliance Groceries
description: Equally AI saved us countless hours by automating fixes we used to do manually. Accessibility standards like WCAG 2.1 are met without adding complexity to our dev teams workload. Customers with disabilities are finding it easier to complete orders.
author: Aaron C.
pros: The widget was simple ti install and fixed major accessibility gaps on our product catalog and checkout pages within minutes. The compliance documents are a huge help for audits.
cons: Widget Customization is limited to present themes. while it works well out of the box design focused brands may want more flexibility in adjusting fonts, colors, and placements to fully match their brand identity
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Kevin S.
pros: Equally AI gave us the peace of mind we needed when modernizing our freight booking platform. The automated audits quickly identified compliance gaps that we would have missed, and the widget allows drivers, dispatchers, and clients of all background to use our site without friction. It's fast, Simple, and reliable.
cons: While it works well, I'd like to see more options for customizing the widget's visual style to align with our brand colors.

review_title: The Pros and Cons of Equallu Al: A Comprehensive Review
